feature: ADR scanner; enriched brief API (layer_contract, relevant_tests, active_adrs); nudge post-edit regression detector; MCP strict guardrail rules SG-005/SG-006

adr_scanner.description: stdlib-only ADR parser; scans decisions/*.md; filters by frontmatter status (accepted/proposed) and relevance (path tokens, task keywords); no pyyaml dependency

brief_enrichment.description: brief API now exposes layer_contract (layer name + allowed/forbidden import lists from guard_contract module), relevant_tests (test files matching scope), and active_adrs (ADR scanner results); guardrails_to_prompt_block extended with Layer Constraints and Active ADR Constraints sections

nudge_regression_detector.description: revert_recommended=True when direction==degrading AND safe_to_commit==False; latency_ms always present; latency_exceeded=True when wall-clock exceeds timeout_ms; auto_fast_path=True when all signals are file-local with exact confidence; agent_instruction contains explicit REVERT directive on degrading+unsafe

mcp_strict_guardrails.description: SG-005: drift_fix_apply blocked without prior drift_brief; SG-006: drift_patch_begin blocked without prior drift_brief; enforced in _strict_guardrail_violations

notes: No signals changed; no audit artifact update required. copilot-instructions.md updated with mandatory Post-Edit Drift-Nudge section. drift.yaml updated to exclude doc_impl_drift from decisions/*.
